summary: The diff implements a comprehensive WRAITH Ops Platform covering all four major requirements: Mission Management Dashboard (REQ-1), Intelligence Hub (REQ-2), Field Ops Briefing Tool (REQ-3), and dark classified-ops visual theme (REQ-4). Backend Motoko actor with stable storage types is present. All three frontend modules and supporting components are implemented. The implementation appears largely complete with minor gaps noted below.

missing_requirements.requirement: Missions must be sortable (not just filterable) in the mission list
missing_requirements.reason: MissionList.tsx implements filtering by status and threat level, but there is no evidence of a sortable column or sort control in the mission list UI. The backend defines sort comparators (compareByLastUpdate, compareByCodename) but no sort UI controls are visible in MissionList.tsx.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redaction-style UI components (blacked-out bars for high-sensitivity fields) should appear throughout sensitive views
missing_requirements.reason: RedactionBar.tsx component exists but there is no evidence it is actually used in any of the three module pages or sensitive field displays — no imports of RedactionBar are visible in the truncated diffs of MissionDashboard, IntelligenceHub, or FieldOpsBriefing pages.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile registration / operative identity setup modal (ProfileSetupModal) with name, callsign, and department fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any user profile registration or operative identity setup flow. This is an extra feature added beyond the specified requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: BriefingObjective priority field (high/medium/low) on briefing objectives
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies an objectives list with add/remove capability but does not mention a priority attribute on each objective. The implementation adds a priority enum to BriefingObjective.
REQ-1 does not mention mission templates. The Mission type in the backend includes an isTemplate boolean field.
